raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-commitment to an empirical stance, reframing evaluation of one's own expectations as an active choice",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "predictions are being made",
    "fear can function as a comparator for those predictions",
    "actual outcomes are observable and distinguishable from fear",
    "the speaker possesses the capacity to choose the comparator"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; cleanly contrasts an empirical test with an affective one without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker can reliably distinguish observed outcomes from feared ones and is prone to treat fear as evidence",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "actual outcomes are themselves interpreted through fear-tinted perception or when fear encodes accurate information that is then dismissed"
}
